title: PackIndex
description: Schema for pack-index.json — the build-time emitted catalog mapping GUIDs to physical asset URLs.

guid.description: RFC 4122 36-char dash-form UUID identifying this asset.

relativeUrl.description: Root-relative URL to the physical asset file in the build output.

sourcePath.description: Relative path to the source .pack.json or .meta.json file from the project root.

refs.description: Optional outgoing dependency edges (GUIDs this asset cross-references), surfaced from pack.json assets[].refs. Add-only field for backward compatibility; absent for legacy rows / kinds with no refs.
